title: Department Manager Vacancy at Shoppers Stop - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Shoppers Stop - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Shoppers Stop! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Faridabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Shoppers Stop:
Shoppers Stop is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shoppers Stop!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
